description: Compact Parsertime-style Marvel Rivals hero kits: weapons, abilities, ultimates, tags, cooldowns, and impact tiers.

impact_scale.negligible: Always-available basics, reloads, stance text, traversal passives, or team-up flavor with little draft/timing value.
impact_scale.low: Useful but routine value: poke, minor mobility, basic damage, or low-commitment utility.
impact_scale.medium: Meaningful cooldown or defensive/sustain tool that can swing a duel or small timing window.
impact_scale.high: Fight-shaping ability, major crowd control, revive/sustain tool, strong engage, or ultimate-level threat.
impact_scale.critical: Draft-defining or fight-winning button that demands tracking, baiting, banning, or coordinated counterplay.

ability1.name: Cosmic Cluster
ability1.description: Cosmic Cluster shares ammo with Quantum Magic, each hit reduces the cooldown of Avatar Life Stream by 0.3s.

ability2.name: Avatar Life Stream
ability2.description: Bouncing target does not include Adam Warlock

ability3.name: Soul Bond
ability3.description: Adam Warlock will share a portion of the damage sustained by linked allies. If Adam Warlock sustains damage that would KO him due to the link, then the link will be broken, and he will retain 1 Health. The link will also break once enough damage is sustained, if Adam Warlock or the linked ally leave the link's range, or after a certain length of time has passed

ult.name: Karmic Revival
ult.description: Revive allies within range, centered on Adam. Continuously monitor for fallen allies within this range; if they enter the area, they can be revived at the casting location

weapon1.name: Spear of Ichors
weapon1.description: Melee lunge that scales with Attack Charge; at full charge launches enemies upward.

weapon2.name: Axes of Ichors
weapon2.description: Alternate twin-axe strikes; fourth strike dashes forward.

ability1.name: Shielded Stance

ability3.name: Divine Judgement
